column3: The contractor shall establish and maintain a security program consistent with the requirements of this rule.
The contractor shall designate KMP including SMO, FSO, and ITPSO.
The contractor shall appoint a U.S. citizen employee as FSO.
The contractor shall appoint a U.S. citizen employee as ITPSO.
The contractor shall establish and maintain an insider threat program.
The contractor shall conduct self-inspections of its security program.
The contractor shall report certain events to the CSA.
Report espionage, sabotage, or subversive activities to FBI and CSA.
Report adverse information on cleared employees to CSA.
Report cyber incidents involving classified systems to CSA.
Eligibility requirements for facility clearances.
Execute exclusion actions for uncleared officials.
Process personnel security clearances per CSA guidance.
Grant access based on need-to-know and clearance level.
Debrief and remove access upon employee separation.
Address foreign ownership, control, or influence over the contractor.
Implement FOCI mitigation measures as required.
File SF 328 Certificate Pertaining to Foreign Interests.
Establish GSC if operating under SSA, Proxy, or VTA.
Conduct annual review with DCSA of FOCI mitigation.
Provide initial security briefings before granting access.
Provide annual security refresher training.
FSO shall complete required training curriculum within 6 months.
Provide insider threat awareness training to all cleared employees.
Apply proper classification markings to classified information.
Train employees authorized to make derivative classification decisions.
Safeguard classified information in accordance with this rule.
Store classified material in approved containers or areas.
Process classified visit requests through DISS.
Verify visitor clearance and need-to-know before granting access.
Include security requirements in classified subcontracts.
Issue DD Form 254 to subcontractors on classified contracts.
Comply with CUI requirements per DoDI 5200.48.
Protect classified information systems per NIST and CNSSI standards.
Monitor user activity on classified systems for insider threat indicators.
Comply with SAP security requirements.
Safeguard COMSEC material per NSA requirements.
